title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Accept the Deed of Donation Being Made by Mr. Francisco Lapiz Married to Angelina Mendoza of Parcels of Land Situated in Barangay Bayog and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: GERONIMO A. CICERON, 01/25/2021)
